methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Lodge Systems is a pre-seed stage company in Defense & Security led by Stuart Lodge. The broader sector comprises 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers including Anduril Industries, Helsing, Shield AI, Saronic, and Quantum-Systems, though no narrow cohort of same-stage or adjacent-stage companies with comparable valuation tiers exists in sufficient density.

Peer-median valuation proved inapplicable. The Defense & Security sector contains 19 total peers, but filtering for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-tier companies yielded fewer than three datapoints in any category. A median calculation across all sector peers would obscure meaningful stage and scale differences and introduce material error. Consequently, traditional comp-based triangulation cannot be reliably executed with the available dataset.

The analysis cannot support a specific valuation range without additional data on Lodge Systems' revenue, capital raised, burn rate, or customer traction, or without application of cost-of-capital or venture-return-multiple methods. Key uncertainties include the precise competitive positioning relative to the identified peer set, the company's current operational stage and funding history, and whether sufficient private-market transaction data exists for Defense & Security pre-seed financings. Further diligence on company fundamentals and narrower stage-specific comparables would be necessary to triangulate value.
